title: Zestful Parsed Ingredient
description: Structured representation of a parsed recipe ingredient from the Zestful API, including quantity, unit, product name, preparation notes, and USDA FoodData Central match.

ingredientRaw.description: The original unparsed ingredient string as submitted.

ingredientParsed.description: Structured breakdown of the parsed ingredient.

quantity.description: Numeric quantity of the ingredient (e.g., 2 for '2 cups flour').

product.description: The purchasable item name (e.g., 'all-purpose flour', 'kosher salt').

usdaInfo.description: USDA FoodData Central database match for this ingredient.

matchMethod.description: Method used to match the ingredient to the USDA database.

category.description: USDA food category (e.g., 'Dairy and Egg Products').

description.description: USDA database description of the matched food item.

confidence.description: Model confidence score (0.0–1.0) for the parse result.

error.description: Error message if the ingredient could not be parsed.
